notes: SNES version has limited audio documentation. Sources mention unused music track (PC version level completion theme replaced with Game Over/High Scores theme in SNES). Debug modes include Music Test and Sound Test accessible via button combinations from title screen. Game features redubbed English voice acting (German voices from original replaced). Instrument test reveals ~8 instrument samples available. No specific tempo, key, chord progression, or melodic analysis documented in available sources.
sources_used: tcrf - The Cutting Room Floor (Wolfenstein 3D SNES article)
